form.formComment: Freshened since an encouraging debut ran on from midfield and won by 1.5 len Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3000m slow going defeating Raffles Choice carrying 67kg at $10 in a hurdle. Has upside and can open winning account.

form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, finished second of 11 runners at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3000m, slow track; 1.5 len behind Interstellar with 65kg at $4.40. Has upside and can open winning account.

form.formComment: Racing second-up. First race start finished 13th of 16 starters at Deauville All Weather on December 2 over 1900m, 11 len behind Los Marinos with 58kg at $85. Returned from break finished third of 11 starters at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3000m, on slow going 1.5 len behind Interstellar carrying 67kg at $28. In the mix.

form.formComment: At debut, finished ninth of 12 starters at this track on March 14 over 3000m, on rain affected going; 41 len behind Navy Du Seuil with 67kg at $13. First up effort suggests unlikely to be winning.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, settled back and ran on when finished seventh of 12 starters at this track on March 14 over 3000m, on a wet track; 10 len behind Navy Du Seuil with 67kg at $27. Better than latest but prefer to see again.
